item.name: Company
Factset Returns the List of People for the Specified Company Identifiers

request.name: Factset Returns the List of People for the Specified Company Identifiers

description.content: Returns the list of executives associated the company identifier requested. Information includes the job functions, email, phone, title, name, and FactSet Entity Identifier. The personId returned can then be used in the `/profiles` endpoint to learn more about the given person.

query.description:
(Required) The requested company identifier. FactSet Identifiers, tickers, CUSIP, SEDOL, and ISIN are accepted inputs.

***ids limit** = 1000 per request*

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective "POST" method.

*

Controls the types of people returned based on high-level job functions. Filter by -   |function|description|  |||  |PEOPLE|Retrieve **ALL** Executives of a requested company|  |OFFICER|Retrieve only the Officers of a requested company|  |DIRECTOR|Retrieve only the Directors of a requested company|

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Factset Returns the List of People for the Specified Company Identifiers and Position

request.name: Factset Returns the List of People for the Specified Company Identifiers and Position

description.content:
Returns the list of people, name, and title for a list of company ids and requested position. Positions include-
  * Chairman
  * Chief Executive Officer
  * President
  * Chief Operating Officer
  * Chief Financial Officer
  * Chief Technology Officer
  * Chief Investment Officer
  * Founder(s)
  * Compliance Officer
  * Admin
  * Independent Director
  * Directors/Board Members
  * Investor Relations
  * Legal Counsel
  * Treasurer
  * Sales and Marketing Managers
  * Human Resources

query.description:
(Required) The requested company identifier. FactSet Identifiers, tickers, CUSIP, SEDOL, and ISIN are accepted inputs.

***ids limit** = 1000 per request*

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective "POST" method.

*

Controls the position details returned for the requested company. By default, the service returns the CEO name, title, and ID for the requested company ids.
  |position|description|
  |||
  |CHAIR|Chairman|
  |CEO|Chief Executive Officer|
  |PRES|President|
  |COO|Chief Operating Officer|
  |CFO|Chief Financial Officer|
  |CTO|Chief Technology Officer|
  |CIO|Chief Investment Officer|
  |FOU|Founder(s)|
  |CMP|Compliance Officer|
  |ADM|Admin|
  |IND|Independent Director|
  |BRD|Directors/Board Members|
  |IR|Investor Relations|
  |LEG|Legal Counsel|
  |TREAS|Treasurer|
  |MKT|Sales and Marketing Managers|
  |HR|Human Resources|

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.name: Factset Returns the Compensation Details of the People for the Specified Company Identifier

description.content: Returns the list of company-level executive compensation data items for the top executives listed in annual filings.The coverage of the compensation details for the executives are limited to US region. All the compensation figures are expressed in raw units.

query.description:
(Required) The requested company identifier. FactSet Identifiers, tickers, CUSIP, SEDOL, and ISIN are accepted inputs.

***ids limit** = 1000 per request*

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective "POST" method.

*

item.name: Factset Returns Statistics About Top Leadership of a Company.

request.name: Factset Returns Statistics About Top Leadership of a Company.

description.content: Returns the statistics such as the average age, tenure, compensation of leadership, number of executives, and the gender diversity of leadership. We can utilize the data for analyzing a company's board and management.

query.description:
(Required) The requested company identifier. FactSet Identifiers, tickers, CUSIP, SEDOL, and ISIN are accepted inputs.

***ids limit** = 1000 per request*

*

Make note, GET Method URL request lines are also limited to a total length of 8192 bytes (8KB). In cases where the service allows for thousands of ids, which may lead to exceeding this request line limit of 8KB, its advised for any requests with large request lines to be requested through the respective "POST" method.

*
Search based on the management and board types. The types include - |type|description|||||MB|Management & Board||MGMT|Management||BRD|Board|

description.content: Returns the `Job` history of the person referenced by the entityId specified in the request.

query.description: (Required) List of FactSet Person Entity identifier.
Select only Jobs with a certain status primary, active, or inactive.
Select the level of detail only main Jobs or include other Jobs at a company.
Select only Jobs of a certain type board member or employee.
